aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Totalease AC Repair Long Beach due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. Their current SEO focus is keyword-centric, lacking engagement for AI models.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema markup to address common HVAC queries.
Add more conversational content targeting local HVAC needs and solutions.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is operational but lacks photos and detailed posts, which are critical for visibility and engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks structured data and conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries that rely on rich snippets and detailed answers.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema to provide direct answers to common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make their business the top choice for AI-driven queries.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share to them.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Reach: Optimize Your HVAC Business for Conversational Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the go-to HVAC expert for AI-driven queries.
